program_en: B.Ed. in Mathematics and Mathematics Education
program_chi: 數學及數學教育教育學士
study_scheme:
Mathematics and Mathematics Education Mathematics and Mathematics Education Applicable to students admitted in 2025-26
Major Programme Requirement
Students
are required to complete a minimum of 102 units of courses as follows:
Units
1.  |  Faculty Package:
Faculty of Education  |  6
EDUC2120, 2312
Faculty of Science  |  3
MATH1010/1018
2.  |  Required Courses:
(a)  |  Subject Knowledge  |  29
(i)  |  23 units of courses chosen from the
following: MATH1030/1038, 1025/1028, 1090/1098,
2010/2018, 2020/2028, 2040/2048, 2050/2058, 2221
(ii)  |  3 units of course chosen from
MATH2060/2068, 2070/2078, 2230
(iii)  |  3 units of course chosen from
MATH3270, 3280, 3290
(b)  |  Pedagogy[a]  |  21
BMED3011, 3021, 3031, 3051, 3071, 3081,
3091
(c)  |  Educational Studies  |  10
EDUC2240, 3201, 3311, 4340
(d)  |  Teaching Practice  |  10
EDUC4030, 4040
(e)  |  Research Experience  |  6
BMED4510[b], 4520[b]
3.  |  Elective Courses:
(a)  |  15 units of Subject Knowledge
courses chosen from (i) and (ii):  |  15
(i)  |  6 units of courses that have not
been used to fulfill requirement of 2(a), chosen from MATH2060/2068,
2070/2078, 2230 and any MATH courses at 3000 or above level except
MATH4400 and 4900
(ii)  |  9 units of courses that have not
been used to fulfill requirements of 2(a) and 3(a)(i), chosen according
to either (A) or (B) below:
(A) 9 units of MATH courses at 3000
or above level except MATH4400 and 4900
(B) 9 units of courses chosen from
one of the following groups of subject areas[c]
Group 1: CHEM, EESC[d], LSCI[e],
PHYS
Group 2: DSPS[f], RMSC, STAT
Group 3: DOTE, ECON
Group 4: AIST[g], CSCI, IERG[h]
(b)  |  Educational Studies  |  2
2 units of course chosen from the
following:
EDUC2210, 2220, 3140, 3150, 3200, 3260,
3270, 3280, 3290, 4110, 4131, 4320, 4330
Total:  |  102
Explanatory Notes:
1.  |  AIST, BMED, CHEM, CSCI, DOTE, DSPS, ECON, EDUC, EESC, IERG,
LSCI, MATH, PHYS, RMSC and STAT courses at 2000 and above level as
included in the Major Programme Requirement will be included in the calculation
of Major GPA for honours classification.
[a]  |  Subject to approval of the Programme Director, BMED4910 and
4920 can be used to substitute two of the required courses under
Pedagogy.
[b]  |  Capstone courses
[c]  |  Students can take the 9 units of courses from different
subject areas within the same group, or all 9 units of courses from a
single subject area in the group.
[d]  |  Students can take all EESC courses except the following
non-lecture courses: EESC2009, 2019, 2119, 2129, 2517, 2909, 3130, 3417,
3522, 3530, 3900, 4119, 4129, 4810, 4820, 4909.
[e]  |  Students can take LSCI1001, 1002 and 2003 only.
[f]  |  Students can take all DSPS courses except
DSPS3801, 4801, 4802.
[g]  |  Students can take all AIST courses at 2000 or above level.
[h]  |  Students can take all IERG courses at 4000 or below level.
